# Pull Request

## Title
- Short, descriptive summary of the change.

## Summary
- What the PR does.
- Why the change is needed.

## Changes
- Bullet list of main implementation changes.
- Mention files or modules touched.

## Verification
- How this was tested.
- Commands run.
- Expected result.

## Notes
- Any caveats, assumptions, or environment requirements.
- If applicable, how to run manual steps.

## Checklist
- [ ] Tests pass
- [ ] No unnecessary UI code
- [ ] OAuth/settings verified if applicable
- [ ] README/docs updated if needed
